<!-- Thanks for contributing! Please fill this in so reviewers can move quickly. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / tech debt
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Data / content

## Screenshots

<!-- For UI changes, add before/after screenshots (desktop and mobile if relevant). -->

## Checks

<!-- All required checks run in CI, but confirm you ran them locally. -->

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] `npm run perf` within the 90 KB gzip budget
- [ ] `npm run e2e` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes
- [ ] Docs updated if setup/behavior changed
- [ ] Bumped `public/sw.js` version if cached assets changed
- [ ] No new tracking, accounts, secrets, or heavyweight dependencies

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything to call out: trade-offs, follow-ups, areas to focus review. -->
